---
title: "John Colson"
---

## John Colson

**Dates:** (1820-1895)

### Description

architect

### Biography

A Winchester architect, he seems to have disagreed with CMY about the extent to which O. B. Carter, rather than WCY, was responsible for the design of the church of St. Matthew, Otterbourne.

See Brenda Poole, <i>John Colson: A Hampshire Architect of the Victorian Age</i> (Winchester: Hampshire Record Office 2000).

### Letters

- Letter from Feb 15th 1869

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
